ddls:
CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sector in which the company operates */,
  "current_market_price" REAL /* Current market price of the company's stock */,
  "change_percentage" REAL /* Percentage change in the stock price */,
  "volume" REAL /* Volume of shares traded */,
  "technical_rating_id" INTEGER /* ID of the technical rating of the company's stock */,
  "company_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the company */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the company was founded */,
  "ceo_name" TEXT /* Name of the CEO */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Location of the company's headquarters */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the company */,
  "stock_exchange" TEXT /* Stock exchange where the company is listed */,
  "ticker_symbol" TEXT /* Ticker symbol of the company's stock */,
  "market_capitalization" REAL /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the company's data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_companies_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("sector_id") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_companies_technical_rating_id FOREIGN KEY ("technical_rating_id") REFERENCES technical_ratings ("rating_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sectors" (
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sector */,
  "sector_name" TEXT /* Name of the sector */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sector */,
  "parent_sector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent sector (if applicable) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the sector was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the sector's data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data entry */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the market data entry */,
  "current_market_price" REAL /* Current market price of the company's stock */,
  "change_percentage" REAL /* Percentage change in the stock price */,
  "volume" REAL /* Volume of shares traded */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the stock during the trading day */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock during the trading day */,
  "adjusted_close_price" REAL /* Adjusted closing price of the stock */,
  "dividend_amount" REAL /* Dividend amount paid on that day */,
  "split_coefficient" REAL /* Split coefficient (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "technical_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each technical rating */,
  "rating_name" TEXT /* Name of the technical rating */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the technical rating */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the technical rating (e.g., algorithm, expert) */,
  "date_generated" TEXT /* Date when the technical rating was generated */,
  "valid_until" TEXT /* Date until the technical rating is valid */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., financial analyst, portfolio manager, retail investor) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the platform */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the user account is active */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user's account */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user (e.g., admin, user, guest) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company whose data is being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the company data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "is_successful" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the access was successful */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)
